name: IEventStore
description: Contract for durable event store implementations. Provides append-only event logging per workflow, with load and truncate operations for checkpoint-based replay.

methods.name: append

params.name: step_id
params.description: Identifier of the step that produced the event

methods.description: Append an event for a workflow step. Events are stored in insertion order.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Load all events for a workflow in insertion order. Returns an empty list if no events exist for the given workflow_id.

methods.name: truncate

params.name: workflow_id
params.description: Identifier of the workflow execution to clear

methods.description: Remove all events for a workflow.

behavioral_expectations: Must implement structural subtyping (Protocol) — no explicit inheritance required
Must be thread-safe — the event store may be shared across concurrent async tasks
All methods are async — storage operations may involve I/O
append() must preserve insertion order — load() returns events in the order they were appended
load() must return an empty list for unknown workflow_ids, never raise
truncate() must be idempotent — calling on an already-empty or unknown workflow_id must not raise
Event dicts must be stored as-is without modification (no schema enforcement on event payloads)
Implementations must support concurrent appends to different workflow_ids without data corruption
